caption: A screen recording captures a web browser displaying a page titled "Rural Community Food System" with the header "Introduction." The main text asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and discusses a "model based on locally owned and operated to benefit the community." The page features a list of "Session Videos" with multiple dated links and a side panel titled "List of Pages." A complex green and yellow diagram is visible in the background of the central text area. In the top right corner, a small webcam overlay shows a man with short brown hair and a beard wearing a gray shirt. As the recording progresses, the user scrolls down the page, shifting the text and the diagram upward. By the final frame, the main content area is mostly black, as the user has scrolled past the primary informational text.
